steps.title: Factor the target expression
steps.content: The target expression is $21+7x$. Factor out $7$: $$21+7x=7(3+x).$$

steps.title: Use the given value directly
steps.content: The problem gives $3+x=64$, so substitute that value into the factored expression: $$21+7x=7(3+x)=7(64)=448.$$ The answer is 448.

steps.title: Why this is faster
steps.content: You could solve $x=61$ first, but it is unnecessary because the expression already contains the group $3+x$ after factoring.
